text.title: llm-judge-rubric-evidence-first Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the input profile satisfy preconditions (required drivers: criteria_count, bias_targets, judge_model)?

conclusion.verdict: Profile incomplete — return structured error, do not guess defaults.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND criteria_count == 'high' or criteria_count >= upper_threshold AND bias_targets == 'advanced'

conclusion.verdict: Pick the advanced/strict variant — see core rules for the precise wiring.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND criteria_count == 'high' or criteria_count >= upper_threshold AND bias_targets != 'advanced'
profile.valid == true AND criteria_count == 'low' or criteria_count < upper_threshold

conclusion.verdict: Pick the low-tier default variant — cheaper, simpler, fewer guarantees.
